title: Auto-Release Queue Item
description: A single purely-additive change consumed by one auto-release cascade tick.

id.description: Unique slug. Must not collide with any prior 'applied' entry.

target.description: Relative path inside the repo. Must be under the mod's data dir and end with .json.

oneOf.title: new_file — create a brand-new file. Refuses to overwrite.

content.description: Complete file contents. JSON object or array.

oneOf.title: add_variant — append one variant to a multi-letter story file. Creates the file/letter if missing.

story_meta.description: Story-level metadata. Must match existing file's metadata when appending.

letter.description: Letter to append to. Created if no existing letter has this index.

variant.description: The variant text to append to letters[<letter.index>].variants[].

oneOf.title: add_random_book_variant — append one variant to a random_book file. Creates the file if missing.

random_book_meta.description: Book-level metadata. id, title, author must match existing file when appending.

variant.description: The variant text to append to the top-level variants[] array.
